title: EpicFight ACG Battlescythe - Revived
description: This mod revives Battle Scythe from Epic ACG Addon.
body:
![battlescythe_revived_logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9a2b427ce4ce710e8435edbdd7a183910d8b03a.png)

![space_blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77a50f24d1bad18e1d0b69d053d25fc765fb4130.png)

**ACG Battlescythe - Revived is a mod that revives a battlescythe moveset from Epic ACG Addon.**

![space_blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77a50f24d1bad18e1d0b69d053d25fc765fb4130.png)


**THIS MOD IS NOT DOING ANYTHING BY ITS OWN, IT REQUIRES A DATAPACK TO FUNCTION PROPERLY!**

**Datapack Example**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![battlescythe_datapack_example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08325d97702cc0d601d1bd98b16c6793b33121c1.png)

</details>

Mod Dependancies:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)


I dont own anything, all of the credits goes to the original mod and its authors. You should check it out for more content!

Epic ACG Addon:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epicfight-acgpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epicfight-acgpack)

**SPECIAL THANKS**

EpicFight Team for creating EpicFight mod.

dfdyz For creating Epic ACG Addon.
